description: Lap 1 rewrites seed/okrs.json to fix the vague key result: adds a concrete numeric target (12) and unit ('percent') to the 'increase conversion rate' key result, which had target: null and unit: ''. The other two key results already have a target, unit, and deadline. check_okrs.py exits 0 on lap 1. Demonstrates the canonical loop reaching DONE with zero API keys and zero external tools.

interactions.agent_output: Ran check_okrs.py: 1 vague key result — 'Increase course landing page conversion rate' has no numeric target and no unit. Adding target: 12 and unit: 'percent' (raise conversion rate by 12 percentage points). Not touching the checker.
interactions.notes: The fix — check_okrs.py now exits 0. bl run reaches DONE on lap 1, keyless, no external tool.

interactions.agent_output: Fix already applied; no further changes needed.
interactions.notes: Fallback for any lap beyond 1 — should not be reached in the happy path.
